IsEnabled.description: True if this accessory slot is capable of accepting an accessory in it

IsHotSwappable.description: True if an accessory can be inserted in the accessory slot while it is powered
True if this accessory can be inserted in the accessory slot while it is powered

IsReady.description: True if this accessory is ready for use

GOOD.description: The acquisition has been completed as requested without any error.

BAD.description: The acquisition has been completed as requested with error.

UNKNOWN.description: The acquisition has been completed but nothing can be said about the quality of the result.

PARTIAL.description: The acquisition has been partially completed as requested without any error.

WARNING_4.description: In warning range (low or high) or some other warning cause

ALARM_32.description: In alarm range (low or high) or some other alarm cause

IDLE.description: Idle, no cleaning or acquisition cycle in progress

DIAGNOSTIC.description: Scquisition cycle collecting data for diagnostic purpose

DIAGNOSTIC_WITH_GRAB_SAMPLE.description: Scquisition cycle collecting data for diagnostic purpose and sample is extracted from the process to be sent in control lab

CLEANING_WITH_GRAB_SAMPLE.description: Cleaning cycle with or without acquisition and sample is extracted from the process to be sent in control lab

CALIBRATION_WITH_GRAB_SAMPLE.description: Calibration acquisition cycle and sample is extracted from the process to be sent in control lab

VALIDATION_WITH_GRAB_SAMPLE.description: Validation acquisition cycle and sample is extracted from the process to be sent in control lab

SAMPLING_WITH_GRAB_SAMPLE.description: Sample acquisition cycle and sample is extracted from the process to be sent in control lab
